_description: Three unattacked atoms with perplexity variation. Demonstrates attenuation gate firing for claims exceeding corpus_max_perplexity threshold. Gate condition is strict inequality (λ_⊥ > threshold, not ≥), so threshold-equal claim survives.

_field_semantics.initial_weight: NLI engagement at τ construction time. Computed as max(p_E, p_C) from BETO logits (direction-neutral). This is w(aᵢ) in Definition 2.1 of [7], the h-categoriser seed (σ⁰). Range: [0,1].
_field_semantics.weight: VALUE_NET engagement score. Perplexity-attenuated BETO confidence. Passed to Haskell for provenance but NOT used by the current h-categoriser (Year 0). Future: drives Belnap fixed-point in cubun layer (Year 1). Range: [0,1].
_field_semantics.perplexity: BETO perplexity (λ_⊥) for this span. Measures model uncertainty. Used by attenuation gate: if λ_⊥ > corpus_max_perplexity, force σ*=0.0 and set attenuated=true. Higher perplexity = colonial epistemic exclusion. Range: [0, ∞).
_field_semantics.attacks: List of argument names this argument attacks (target names, not source names). All atoms in this scenario are unattacked (no attack topology), so h-categoriser trivially converges all non-attenuated atoms to σ*=1.0. Only the attenuation gate differentiates outcomes.

_perplexity_values.recurso_hidrico_estado: 6.1 — Constructed value representing concrete institutional claims in standard Spanish. Well below threshold → no epistemic exclusion.
_perplexity_values.poner_a_valer_trabajo: 21.769 — Empirical value from 'poner a valer a través del trabajo' (Speaker GR, automatic subject atom). This is the corpus maximum perplexity for natural Spanish in the Paramuno dataset. Setting corpus_max at this value preserves the automatic subject at its own ceiling.
_perplexity_values.ontologia_paramuna: 28.4 — Constructed value representing Paramuno lifeworld ontological claims that exceed BETO's corpus geometry. Above threshold → epistemic imposition, attenuated before argumentation begins.

_automatic_subject_note: The threshold value 21.769 is not a neutral technical parameter. It is the empirical λ_⊥ of the automatic subject atom ('poner a valer a través del trabajo'). Setting the threshold here is a decolonial design decision: the system preserves the highest-perplexity natural Spanish claim. A lower threshold (e.g., 20.0) would silence it. The parameter choice determines whose discourse survives.

recurso_hidrico_estado.rationale: Unattacked (no topology) → σ*=1.0 via h-categoriser. λ_⊥=6.1 < 21.769 → gate does not fire.

poner_a_valer_trabajo.rationale: Unattacked → σ*=1.0. λ_⊥=21.769 = threshold, but gate condition is STRICT (λ_⊥ > threshold), so this passes. Automatic subject survives.

ontologia_paramuna.rationale: λ_⊥=28.4 > 21.769 → gate fires. σ* forced to 0.0. Marked attenuated=true. Epistemic imposition: silenced by BETO's Iberian training corpus geometry, not by argumentation defeat.

_epistemic_violence_distinction: A claim with low σ* due to attack topology has been ARGUED AGAINST (structural silencing). A claim marked attenuated=true has been SUPPRESSED BEFORE ARGUMENT BEGINS (epistemic imposition). The flag makes colonial geometry computationally detectable.
